problems.text: Kenga always makes one large jump following with two small jumps. Kenga starts at 0 and ends on 11. How many jumps did Kenga make?
A full glass of water weighs 400g and the empty glass weights 100g. How many grams does a half full glass of water weigh?

Albert rearranges five cards with numbers printed on them shown below. He wants to get smallest 8 digit number. (He cannot cut the cards to separate the digits e.g 59 always is 59 and cannot be made into 5 and 9). Which number will be at the right hand end?
problems.label: My answer:

problems.text: How many squares will balance the three triangles?

problems.html: 3 hens lay 3 eggs in 3 days. How many eggs will 6 hens lay in 6 days? (Hint: how many eggs does 1 hen lay in 3 days?)
